name: CLOROX CO /DE/
business: The Clorox Company is a leading multinational manufacturer and marketer of consumer and professional products with fiscal year 2025 net sales of $7.1 billion and about 7,600 employees worldwide as of June 30, 2025. The Company markets brand names including Clorox, Pine-Sol, Glad, Kingsford, Hidden Valley, Brita, and Burt's Bees, among others. The Company sells its products primarily through mass retailers, grocery outlets, warehouse clubs, dollar stores, home hardware centers, drug, pet and military stores, third-party and owned e-commerce channels, and distributors.
namedCustomers: Walmart Stores, Inc. and its affiliates

exposures.sentence: The Clorox Company is a leading multinational manufacturer and marketer of consumer and professional products with fiscal year 2025 net sales of $7.1 billion and about 7,600 employees worldwide as of June 30, 2025.

This investment began in fiscal year 2022, and includes replacement of the Company's enterprise resource planning system (ERP) and transitioning to a cloud-based platform as well as the implementation of a suite of other digital technologies.

The Company entered fiscal year 2025 in a position of operational strength, having fully recovered from the August 2023 cyberattack and delivered strong execution against its IGNITE goals during the prior fiscal year.

catalysts.event: Wind down of Venture Agreement with P&G for Glad bags and wraps
catalysts.sentence: In February 2025, the Company announced that the Venture Agreement with The Procter & Gamble Company (P&G) for the Company's Glad bags and wraps business will wind down by January 31, 2026.
